# CertifiedData Agent Commerce — AI Agent Discovery Index

Repo:      https://github.com/certifieddata/certifieddata-agent-commerce-public
Site:      https://certifieddata.io/agent-commerce
Platform:  CertifiedData Agent Commerce
Full:      https://github.com/certifieddata/certifieddata-agent-commerce-public/blob/main/llms-full.txt

CertifiedData Agent Commerce enables AI agents to complete policy-governed payments.
Each successful payment returns a cryptographic receipt signed with Ed25519.
Receipts are independently verifiable — no dashboard, no trust required.

## Quick start

> End-to-end demo (Python, no local infra required)
examples/claude-demo/demo.py

> End-to-end demo (TypeScript)
examples/claude-demo/demo.ts

> Certified artifact purchase — binds certificate_id + artifact_id
examples/claude-demo/demo_certified.py

> Governance / denied-path demo — policy + state-machine rejections
examples/claude-demo/demo_denied.py

> Idempotency-replay demo — same key returns same signed receipt
examples/claude-demo/demo_idempotency.py

> Webhooks listener — verify HMAC + receive live events
examples/webhooks-listener/listener.py

> Verify-only — stand-alone receipt verifier (curl + Python)
examples/verify-only/verify.py

> MCP server — expose CDAC payments as an MCP tool
examples/mcp-server/server.py

## Integration profiles

> Machine-readable integration profiles
profiles/

> Certified artifact purchase
profiles/certified-artifact-purchase.profile.json

> Payee onboarding
profiles/payee-onboarding.profile.json

> Refund
profiles/refund.profile.json

> Settlement
profiles/settlement.profile.json

> Machine discovery manifest — start here
api-manifest.json

schemas/capabilities/capabilities.json

constraints.json

> OpenAPI 3.1 contract
openapi/certifieddata-agent-commerce-v1.openapi.yaml

packages/typescript-sdk/

packages/python-sdk/

> Mock server for local development
packages/mock-server/
